data.body: Create LeaseReference typed struct in domain/lease.rs. Create ImmutableRecord trait in new domain/immutable.rs with record_id(), created_at(), lease_ref() methods. Add lease_ref: Option<LeaseReference> to MetadataEntry. Add lease_ref + supersedes_id to StepRecord. Replace lease_id in StepActorInfo with lease_ref. Implement ImmutableRecord for both types. Unit tests for all new types.
data.title: WP1: Domain types — LeaseReference, ImmutableRecord trait, field additions
